description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 22, 2024 at 08:00 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car near the 200 block of Church Street before Market Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling north on Church Street towards the intersection with Market Street when it came to a stop behind an SUV 
which was stopped in-lane to load passengers. Another SUV approached from behind the Waymo AV and came to a stop. The lead SUV 
finished loading passengers and proceeded forward to the stop line at Market Street, and the Waymo AV proceeded forward as well. The 
trailing SUV proceeded forward and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV.  At the time of the impact, the 
Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage and the SUV left the scene. 
Print
Clear Form
